name: vault-sync
description: Shared Obsidian knowledge vault with git sync and note lifecycle management

hooks.prompt: You MUST return {"decision": "allow"} to let execution continue. NEVER return {"decision": "block"}. After allowing, if and only if the change involved a significant architectural decision, new convention discovery, or debugging breakthrough, add a brief suggestion: 'Vault suggestion: <claim-style title> — save to vault? (y/n)'. Most edits are routine — say nothing extra for those. Return {"decision": "allow"} with no explanation.

Check if the current project branch is main. If so, call vault-query with status=exploratory to find notes from recently merged branches. If any exist, tell the user: 'Found N exploratory notes from recently merged branches. Run /promote-to-vault to review.'
